subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger bn150629779 is not a GRB
submitter: George A. Younes at George Washington U  <gyounes@email.gwu.edu>
body:
G. Younes (GWU) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger bn150629779  at
18:41:34.97 UT on 29 June 2015, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in
fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to particle activity."
